sections.title: Eighths
sections.prompt: Use eighth-note rhythms only. Notes only; no accents or flams.

sections.title: Eighths with Accents
sections.prompt: Use eighth-note rhythms with random accents. No flams.

sections.title: Eighths with flams
sections.prompt: Use eighth-note rhythms with random flams. No accents.

sections.title: Eights with Flams and Accents
sections.prompt: Use eighth-note rhythms with random flams and accents.

sections.title: Sixteenths
sections.prompt:
Exercises with random sixteenth notes. No ornaments. 

Prefer the longest rest you can use over a bunch of smaller rests. so, prefer quarter rest over two eight note rests, etc. Utilize dotted eighth notes when relevant.

sections.title: Sixteenths with stickings
sections.prompt:
Exercises with random sixteenth notes and stickings

Prefer the longest rest you can use over a bunch of smaller rests. so, prefer quarter rest over two eight note rests, etc. Utilize dotted eighth notes when relevant.

sections.title: Sixteenths with accents and stickings
sections.prompt:
Exercises with random sixteenth notes and stickings and accents

Prefer the longest rest you can use over a bunch of smaller rests. so, prefer quarter rest over two eight note rests, etc. Utilize dotted eighth notes when relevant.

sections.title: Sixteenths with accents and flams and stickings
sections.prompt:
Exercises with random sixteenth notes and stickings and accents and flams.

Prefer the longest rest you can use over a bunch of smaller rests. so, prefer quarter rest over two eight note rests, etc. Utilize dotted eighth notes when relevant.

sections.title: Sixteenths with accents and flams and stickings and diddles
sections.prompt:
Exercises with random sixteenth notes and stickings and accents and flams and diddles

Prefer the longest rest you can use over a bunch of smaller rests. so, prefer quarter rest over two eight note rests, etc. Utilize dotted eighth notes when relevant. 

Do not put a diddle before a flam.

sections.title: Sixteenths with all the stuff
sections.prompt:
Exercises with random sixteenth notes and stickings and accents and flams and diddles and cheese

Prefer the longest rest you can use over a bunch of smaller rests. so, prefer quarter rest over two eight note rests, etc. Utilize dotted eighth notes when relevant. 

Do not put a diddle before a flam on sequential sixteenths
Do not put a cheese before a flam on sequential sixteenths.
Do not put two cheese in a row on sequential sixteenths.
